name: Celsius!
html:
Celsius!
100°C
~~~
css: .celsius-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0f2027, #203a43, #2c5364); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .thermometer { width: clamp(12px, 3vw, 18px); height: clamp(60px, 14vw, 100px); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; position: relative; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-bottom: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .mercury { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 80%; background: linear-gradient(to top, #ff4e50, #fc913a); border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0; animation: boil 1.2s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes boil { 0% { height: 70%; } 100% { height: 92%; } } .bulb { width: clamp(18px, 4vw, 26px); height: clamp(18px, 4vw, 26px); background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, #ff7f50, #ff4e50); border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top: -2px; box-shadow: 0 0 12px 4px rgba(255,78,80,0.6); animation: pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes pulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 12px 4px rgba(255,78,80,0.6); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 22px 8px rgba(255,78,80,0.9); } } .label { font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 4vw, 2.2rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 18px #ff4e50, 0 0 35px #fc913a; animation: flicker 2.5s infinite; margin-top: 8px; } @keyframes flicker { 0%,100% { opacity:1; text-shadow: 0 0 18px #ff4e50, 0 0 35px #fc913a; } 48% { opacity:0.92; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff4e50; } 50% { opacity:1; text-shadow: 0 0 24px #fc913a, 0 0 48px #ff4e50; } } .degrees { font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 2.2vw, 1.1rem); color: #fc913a; letter-spacing: 0.2em; margin-top: 2px; opacity: 0.85; } .steam { display: flex; gap: clamp(4px, 1.5vw, 10px); margin-top: 4px; } .steam span { font-size: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.6rem); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); animation: rise 1.8s ease-in-out infinite; } .steam span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.4s; } .steam span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.8s; } @keyframes rise { 0% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 0.7; } 100% { transform: translateY(-18px); opacity: 0; } }
